title: Floral Fluffy Croatian Grape Stir-fry
description: A floral and fluffy dish featuring grape juice as the star ingredient, perfect for a post-workout meal.

ingredients.name: Chicken breast (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a meat option, cook separately before mixing in.

ingredients.name: Scallions
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely to add freshness and crunch.

instructions: Prepare the grape juice by chilling it, then pour over ingredients in a wok or large skillet.
Heat sesame oil in a preheated pan with garlic and scallions until fragrant.
Add chicken breast (if using) and cook until fully cooked. Remove from heat.
In the same pan, add fresh thyme leaves and pepper flakes. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Mix grape juice mixture into the pan with the stir-fried ingredients, adjusting seasoning as needed.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
